hooks.command: ROOT="/Users/qirui/momenta/pdf_translator"; fp=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$fp" in "~/"*) fp="$HOME/${fp#~/}" ;; esac; blocked=0; case "$fp" in "$ROOT/agents/"*|"$ROOT/contracts/"*|"$ROOT/scripts/"*) blocked=1 ;; esac; [ "$fp" = "$ROOT/run_pipeline.py" ] && blocked=1; case "$fp" in "$ROOT/consolidator"*.py) blocked=1 ;; esac; remainder="${fp#$ROOT/}"; case "$remainder" in *.py) case "$remainder" in */*) : ;; *) blocked=1 ;; esac ;; esac; [ "$blocked" = "1" ] && echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Main thread must not edit project source files directly. Delegate to agents."}'; exit 0
